items: Travel from a safe hub/village area into an open combat zone without opening menus
Traverse a large overworld area while scanning for secrets, collectibles, and challenge markers
Enter an ancient ruin or temple and record a full exploration pass from entrance to exit
Move from overworld traversal into a contained combat arena organically
Find and collect a visible upgrade pickup
Explore off the main path and uncover an optional chest or hidden reward
Activate the Spirit Realm to reveal a hidden bridge or path
Use the Spirit Realm to uncover a secret platforming route
Solve a simple environmental puzzle that requires switching in and out of the Spirit Realm
Use Spirit Realm vision to locate a hidden collectible
Enter a puzzle space, fail once intentionally, then recover and solve it correctly
Complete a hidden-path discovery sequence from clue recognition to reward pickup

task_groups.group: Core Combat, Weapon Identity & Combo Play
items: Defeat a basic enemy group using only one weapon's light/heavy combo chain
Launch enemies and follow with an air combo
Record a clean dodge-based encounter with minimal damage taken
Record a parry into punish sequence
Fight a mixed enemy group and prioritize targets by threat type
Build and maintain a long combo string across multiple enemies
Show a fight that uses melee strikes, ranged attacks, and a finisher in one sequence
Fight in a tight arena where crowd positioning matters
Showcase each weapon type briefly in separate encounters
Switch weapons between encounters to demonstrate style differences
Use one weapon for crowd control and another for a single tougher enemy
Record the same enemy type fought with two different weapon styles
Use a construct summon offensively to start a fight
Use a construct in the middle of a combo chain rather than only as an opener
Use a ranged/runic attack to finish an enemy at distance
Use a construct to control space against a group
Record a fight where construct cooldown management matters
Compare a no-construct version of a fight to a construct-assisted version
Use multiple magical/runic abilities in one encounter
Complete a traversal route that depends on precise jumps
Use double jump to access an otherwise unreachable collectible or route
Record a failed platforming attempt and successful recovery
Traverse vertically through ruins using ledges, jumps, and movement upgrades
Use the spider construct/mount in traversal where it clearly improves mobility
Record a full boss attempt from intro to defeat
Record a boss retry where the second attempt shows improved pattern recognition
Focus on a boss fight built around parry timing
Focus on a boss fight built around dodge and spacing
Use constructs strategically during a boss fight
Complete a combat challenge/arena encounter cleanly
Replay a challenge encounter with a different weapon style
Record a multi-wave combat challenge as a crowd-control stress test
Record a low-health recovery fight where survival depends on spacing and dodge timing
Combine movement and combat by entering a fight directly after a traversal sequence
Pick up a side quest from a Diokek villager
Complete a simple fetch-style side objective and return for the reward
Complete a 'clear enemies' side task and turn it in
Record a clip focused on NPC interaction, then immediate transition into exploration
Visit a hub/vendor/reward interaction point and purchase or claim an upgrade-related item
Show how side quest rewards feed back into progression or combat readiness
Spend upgrade resources on combo-oriented skills, then immediately demonstrate them in combat
Record a 'before and after upgrade' clip showing how a new skill changes combat behavior
Travel from a quest giver to the quest objective and back
Record a clean navigation clip that demonstrates readable pathing without HUD reliance
